subject: [PATCH v5 1/3] x86/tdx: Fix off-by-one in port I/O handling

2026-07-01.patch_summary: This patch fixes an off-by-one error in port I/O handling for the x86/tdx architecture. The GENMASK macro was being used incorrectly, resulting in a mask that was one bit too wide for all I/O sizes. The fix involves subtracting 1 from the size when calculating the mask to ensure it is the correct width.
